validationRules.description: L2 scenario: declarative guard blocks names containing BLOCKED.
L3 demo trap: blocks edits to Acme Corp / Recipe Test Account for rich-approval demos. (Org Trailhead AccountTrigger blocks creating Name=Acme Corp, so Recipe Test Account is the live seed.)
validationRules.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT(ISNEW()), OR(Name = "Acme Corp", Name = "Recipe Test Account"))
validationRules.errorMessage: Updates to this legacy account are blocked by Block_Legacy_Updates. Contact a System Administrator.
